name_en: 【With full counter green packaging】!!️Genuine product custom-made mold, correct specifications and lining, exclusive in the market, pattern has become a brand icon, made of imported cowhide, simple and atmospheric, super large capacity, very practical, detachable Italian leather strap! The inside, sides, and bottom are made of top-grade cowhide.
